PREDICATES:
in_club(x) ::: x is in this club
perform_in_talent_show(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows
attend_school(x) ::: x attends the school
engage_with_school(x) ::: x is very engaged with school events
chaperone_dance(x) ::: x chaperone high school dances
inactive_community_member(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested community member
young_child_or_teenager(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager
further_academic_career(x) ::: x wishes to further their academic careers and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
forall x (in_club(x) & perform_in_talent_show(x) -> attend_school(x) & engage_with_school(x))
forall x (in_club(x) -> (perform_in_talent_show(x) | inactive_community_member(x)))
forall x (in_club(x) & chaperone_dance(x) -> not attend_school(x))
forall x (in_club(x) & inactive_community_member(x) -> chaperone_dance(x))
forall x (in_club(x) & young_child_or_teenager(x) & further_academic_career(x) -> attend_school(x))
in_club(bonnie)
in_club(bonnie) & (perform_in_talent_show(bonnie) | not (perform_in_talent_show(bonnie) & not attend_school(bonnie)))

CONCLUSION:
perform_in_talent_show(bonnie)

PREDICATES:
club_member(x) ::: x is a member of this club
perform_in_talent_show(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows
attend_school(x) ::: x attends the school
engage_with_school(x) ::: x is very engaged with school events
chaperone_dance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
inactive_community_member(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested member of the community
young_child_or_teenager(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager who wishes to further her academic career and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
forall x (club_member(x) -> (perform_in_talent_show(x) | inactive_community_member(x)))
forall x (club_member(x) -> (perform_in_talent_show(x) | inactive_community_member(x)))
forall x (club_member(x) & engage_with_school(x) -> ~attend_school(x))
forall x (club_member(x) & inactive_community_member(x) -> chaperone_dance(x))
forall x (club_member(x) & young_child_or_teenager(x) -> attend_school(x))
club_member(bonnie)
bonnie -> (young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & chaperone_dance(bonnie) | ~(young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) & chaperone_dance(bonnie)))
young_child_or_teenager(bonnie) -> (attend_school(bonnie) | inactive_community_member(bonnie))

CONCLUSION:
attend_school(bonnie) | inactive_community_member(bonnie)

PREDICATES:

perform_in_talent_show(x) ::: x performs in school talent shows often
attend_school(x) ::: x is a student who attends the school
engage_with_school(x) ::: x is very engaged with school events
chaperone_dance(x) ::: x chaperones high school dances
inactive_community_member(x) ::: x is an inactive and disinterested member of the community
young_child_or_teenager(x) ::: x is a young child or teenager who wishes to further her academic career and educational opportunities

PREMISES:
forall x (club_member(x) -> (perform_in_talent_show(x) | inactive_community_member(x)))
forall x (club_member(x) -> (chaperone_dance(x) -> not attend_school(x)))
forall x (inactive_community_member(x) -> chaperone_dance(x))
forall x (young_child_or_teenager(x) -> attend_school(x))
club_member(bonnie)
forall x (club_member(x) -> (engage_with_school(x) -> attend_school(x))) 
forall x (club_member(x) -> (not (engage_with_school(x) & attend_school(x)) -> not attend_school(x)))

CONCLUSION:
forall x (club_member(x) -> (chaperone_dance(x) | perform_in_talent_show(x)) -> (young_child_or_teenager(x) & inactive_community_member(x)))
